name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve

---

If you've arrived here to ask a question about how to use Asciidoctor or the AsciiDoc syntax, please direct your question to the #users/asciidoctor.js stream in the project chat at https://chat.asciidoctor.org instead. You can learn more about the project support policy on the following page: https://docs.asciidoctor.org/about/support/

If you're here to report a bug, please verify that you're using the latest patch release. If not, please upgrade and retest your scenario.

Once you've confirmed you're in the right place, you may delete this message and proceed!

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Versions** (please complete the following information):
 - OS: [e.g. Ubuntu, Windows]
 - JavaScript engine: [e.g. Chrome, Node 24.14.0]
 - Asciidoctor.js version: [e.g. 3.2.1]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
